Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BASSIAN FARMS INC.'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment as to Defendant FOURTH FLOOR RESTAURANT LLC is Denied. It does not appear that defendant has been properly served with the summons, complaint, or papers for the attachment order and, even if it was, the better course is to seek entry of default and default judgment for failure to respond to the complaint, rather than a pre-judgment remedy such as an attachment order. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk
